array.string: cd '/Users/kreniq/Library/Application Support/CAPAS/capas-inteligentes' && /usr/bin/git fetch origin main && /usr/bin/git reset --hard origin/main && echo "[$(/bin/date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] CAPAS daily SOTA watch started" && /usr/bin/python3 scripts/update_sota_watch.py && echo "[$(/bin/date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] CAPAS validation started" && /usr/bin/python3 capas.py validate && echo "[$(/bin/date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)] CAPAS daily SOTA watch finished"
